## Workflow Checklist

- [ ] Branch naming follows `feat|fix|refactor|docs|chore/<name>`
- [ ] Commit messages follow `type(scope): summary`
- [ ] PR title follows `type(scope): summary`
- [ ] Changelog decision made (update only for notable main merges)
- [ ] This PR can be merged with Squash merge
